channel.title: Daily arXiv Digest (JP)
channel.description: 毎朝の arXiv 注目論文10本を、NotebookLM が日本語ポッドキャストで紹介。
channel.itunes:author: M-Aji
channel.itunes:summary: 毎朝の arXiv 注目論文10本を、NotebookLM が日本語ポッドキャストで紹介。

item.title: arXiv 2026-05-30
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. SoundnessBench: Can Your AI Scientist Really Tell Good Research Ideas from Bad Ones? — Sy-Tuyen Ho, Minghui Liu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30329 2. Improved Guarantees for Heterogeneous Treatment-Effect Estimation via Matrix Completion — Anay Mehrotra, Phuc Tran et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30319 3. LLMSurgeon: Diagnosing Data Mixture of Large Language Models — Yaxin Luo, Jiacheng Cui et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30348 4. Unlocking the Working Memory of Large Language Models for Latent Reasoning — Lukas Aichberger, Sepp Hochreiter https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30343 5. In-Context Reward Adaptation for Robust Preference Modeling — Zhenyu Sun, Zheng Xu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30323

item.title: arXiv 2026-05-28
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. Alignment Tampering: How Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback Is Exploited to Optimize Misaligned Biases — Dongyoon Hahm, Dylan Hadfield-Menell et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27355 2. MUSE-Autoskill: Self-Evolving Agents via Skill Creation, Memory, Management, and Evaluation — Huawei Lin, Peng Li et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27366 3. Governed Evolution of Agent Runtimes through Executable Operational Cognition — Mariano Garralda-Barrio https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27328 4. FinHarness: An Inline Lifecycle Safety Harness for Finance LLM Agents — Haoxuan Jia, Yang Liu et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27333 5. Algorithmic Monocultures in Hiring — Rishi Bommasani, Sarah H. Bana et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27371

item.title: arXiv 2026-05-27
item.description:
本日の注目論文：
1. From Model Scaling to System Scaling: Scaling the Harness in Agentic AI — Shangding Gu https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26112 2. Automated Benchmark Auditing for AI Agents and Large Language Models — Junlin Wang, Federico Bianchi et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26079 3. Claw-Anything: Benchmarking Always-On Personal Assistants with Broader Access to User's Digital World — Yusong Lin, Xinyuan Liang et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26086 4. DiscoverPhysics: Benchmarking LLMs for Out-of-the-Box Scientific Thinking — Matt L. Wiemann, Lindsay M. Smith et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26087 5. MobileGym: A Verifiable and Highly Parallel Simulation Platform for Mobile GUI Agent Research — Dingbang Wu, Rui Hao et al. https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26114
